name: AParadise Acquisition Corp.
summary: A Paradise Acquisition Corp. (formerly A Paradigm Acquisition Corp.) is a blank check company incorporated in the British Virgin Islands on November 9, 2022, formed to effect a business combination. The company completed its IPO on July 31, 2025, raising $200,000,000, with funds held in trust. It intends to pursue targets in the leisure and entertainment sector and has entered a Business Combination Agreement with Enhanced Ltd.
